title: Stub Mapping
description: A WireMock stub mapping that defines how the mock server responds to matched incoming requests.

id.description: The UUID identifier for this stub mapping.

uuid.description: Alias for the stub mapping UUID.

name.description: A human-readable name for this stub mapping.

priority.description: Priority of this stub mapping (lower number = higher priority). Used when multiple stubs match.

request.description: The request pattern that incoming requests must match.

url.description: Exact URL to match (including query string).

urlPath.description: Exact URL path to match (ignoring query string).

urlPattern.description: Regex pattern to match against the full URL.

urlPathPattern.description: Regex pattern to match against the URL path only.

headers.description: Request headers that must be present and match.

queryParameters.description: Query parameters that must be present and match.

bodyPatterns.description: Patterns that the request body must match.

response.description: The response to return when a request matches.

status.description: The HTTP status code to return.

body.description: The response body as a string.

jsonBody.description: The response body as a JSON object (automatically serialized).

base64Body.description: The response body as a base64-encoded string.

bodyFileName.description: Path to a file containing the response body.

fixedDelayMilliseconds.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds before the response is sent.

fault.description: Simulate a network fault instead of returning a normal response.

transformers.description: List of response transformer names to apply.

proxyBaseUrl.description: Base URL to proxy requests to (for proxy stubs).

scenarioName.description: The name of the scenario this stub participates in for stateful behavior.

requiredScenarioState.description: The scenario state that must be active for this stub to match.

newScenarioState.description: The scenario state to transition to after this stub is matched.

persistent.description: Whether this stub mapping should be persisted to the backing store.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata attached to the stub mapping for categorization.
